title: BBA (Digital Marketing)
content: BBA in Digital Marketing at the School of Business, Galgotias University, addresses the growing need for digital marketing professionals in various industries. This program integrates traditional marketing management principles with cutting-edge digital marketing technologies and trends. The program equips graduates to lead digital marketing initiatives within organizations. The program includes specialized courses on Digital Consumer Behaviour, Search Engine Optimization, Search Engine Advertising, Content Marketing System, Digital metrics and KPIs, Digital Analytics, and many other software. NOTE: For selected 3 Year Undergraduate programs, students have the option to continue for 4th year to obtain a Honours Degree. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list Graduates with BBA in Digital Marketing find job opportunities across industries such as ecommerce, technology products, digital platforms, consulting, manufacturing, logistics, KPOs and agencies for digital publishing as well marketing. They can also act as freelance digital marketer and scale up professional services in digital marketing domain. The roles being offered are Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO), Digital Product Manager, Customer Relationship Manager, Brand Manager, Content Strategist, Digital Advertising Specialist, UX/UI Specialist, E-commerce Manager, Category Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, Digital Intrapreneurs by leading organizations such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon, CEAT Tyres, Maruti, Indiamart, KPMG, PWC, Flipkart, DHL, Spotify, Netflix, American Express, Airbnb, OYO, Nike etc. 01 BBA (Digital Marketing) aims to prepare students develop Digital Marketing Skills, Leverage Advanced Technologies, Foster Innovation Through Design Thinking so that they excel into various evolving roles relevant to digital marketing. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 Graduate shall grow personally and professionally to be successful in dynamic digital marketing area globally. 02 Graduate shall lead with creative, analytical and entrepreneurial skills to help organizations achieve a competitive advantage using digital marketing. 03 Graduate shall contribute as socially and ethically responsible citizen towards the sustainable development of environment and society at large. 01 Develop and implement digital marketing strategies that align with business goals. 02 Manage social media campaigns and optimizing content for search engines. 03 Create engaging content that drives brand awareness and customer engagement.
